description: Determines the role and nature of monsters in a fantasy world.

descriptionTranslations.en: Determines the role and nature of monsters in a fantasy world.

entries.result: Common and Feared: Monsters can be found everywhere, and sow destruction wherever they are

resultTranslations.en: Common and Feared: Monsters can be found everywhere, and sow destruction wherever they are

entries.result: Common and Social: Monsters are common and live everyday lives like anyone else

resultTranslations.en: Common and Social: Monsters are common and live everyday lives like anyone else

entries.result: Rare and Feared: Monsters are uncommon, but when one appears it is a cause for great anxiety and fear

resultTranslations.en: Rare and Feared: Monsters are uncommon, but when one appears it is a cause for great anxiety and fear

entries.result: Very Rare: Monsters are so rare that few believe in them. When one appears it is a special and, often, horrible occasion

resultTranslations.en: Very Rare: Monsters are so rare that few believe in them. When one appears it is a special and, often, horrible occasion

entries.result: Signature Monster: There is one type of monster that is known and feared. There may be more, but this is the most frequent. For instance, orcs who raid fringe lands

resultTranslations.en: Signature Monster: There is one type of monster that is known and feared. There may be more, but this is the most frequent. For instance, orcs who raid fringe lands

entries.result: Monsters as Animals: Monsters are common but they fill a role in the ecosystem like any other natural animal. While many can be fearsome, most are harmless or useful

resultTranslations.en: Monsters as Animals: Monsters are common but they fill a role in the ecosystem like any other natural animal. While many can be fearsome, most are harmless or useful

entries.result: Magic Monsters: Monsters exist, but as a result of magic. For instance, all monsters are constructs built by wizards or summoned creatures

resultTranslations.en: Magic Monsters: Monsters exist, but as a result of magic. For instance, all monsters are constructs built by wizards or summoned creatures

entries.result: Legendary: Monsters are very rare but feared. Each is a unique creature, not part of a species, and have their own origins and motives

resultTranslations.en: Legendary: Monsters are very rare but feared. Each is a unique creature, not part of a species, and have their own origins and motives

entries.description: Roll one Keyword from the Adventure Tone Meaning table for a total of two Keywords to make your interpretation

descriptionTranslations.en: Roll one Keyword from the Adventure Tone Meaning table for a total of two Keywords to make your interpretation
